status: Failed
state: halted
merge: merge-parity-1 (open)
participants: total 6; planned 1; conflicted 1; failed 1; continued 1; aborted 1; rolled-back 1

recovery commands:
  inspect:  gwz merge --status
  continue: gwz merge --continue
  abort:    gwz merge --abort
operation drift:
  baseline-manifest-changed: manifest changed after planning
participants:
  lib (mem_lib)  planned (merge commit)
    source: feature/x @ source123
    recorded: branch main; before before123; result -
    live: commit unknown
    recovery: continue unknown; abort unknown
    pending action: true-merge (not-started): Git action is durably journaled and has not started

    source: feature/x @ source123
    recorded: branch main; before before123; result -
    live: commit before123
    recovery: continue blocked; abort eligible
    conflicts: guide.md
    drift: head-advanced: HEAD advanced while merge was open

    source: feature/x @ source123
    recorded: branch main; before before123; result continued123
    live: commit continued123
    recovery: continue blocked; abort blocked

    source: feature/x @ source123
